title: Global gas rallies amid signs of stronger demand
section_path: Global gas rallies amid signs of stronger demand
section_path_text: Global gas rallies amid signs of stronger demand
summary:
Main
Mixed economic data left commodity markets uncertain about the demand outlook. Metals fell while energy and bulks made small gains. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-02-29 09.58.26.png | assets/2024-02-29_global-gas-rallies-amid-signs-of-stronger-demand_img_screenshot2024-02-29095826_d59a589d8af1.png
Crude oil was little changed as higher inventories tempered optimism of tighter supplies in recent weeks.
